ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is managing */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "coaching_experience" TEXT /* Coaching experience of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., regular season, playoff, final) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the stats were recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player to whom the stats belong */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played by the player in this game */,
  "fgm_a" TEXT /* Field goals made and attempted */,
  "3pm_a" TEXT /* Three-point field goals made and attempted */,
  "ftm_a" TEXT /* Free throws made and attempted */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made by the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "st" INTEGER /* Total steals made by the player */,
  "bs" INTEGER /* Total blocks made by the player */,
  "to" INTEGER /* Total turnovers made by the player */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls committed by the player */,
  "minutes_played" TEXT /* Minutes played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who got injured */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "expected_recovery_time" TEXT /* Expected recovery time for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, player) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-team association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
